attr.title: Zelda II: Enhanced
attr.desc: Zelda II Enhanced adds a ton of QoL improvements, widescreen, new areas, and new collectibles. The game is arguably much easier to play through.
attr.inst: Download the .zip from https://hoverbat.itch.io/ziiaol and put it in the ziiaol/assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Download the .zip from [Itch.io](https://hoverbat.itch.io/ziiaol) and put it in the `ziiaol/assets` folder.
